title: Update: Stop & Go on N2 near Buffels Bay
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - In the latest update...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - In the latest update from George Municipality, following the complete closure of the N2 due to a vehicle on fire near the turnoff to Buffels Bay, a Stop and Go has been put in place to allow traffic flow.


> Motorists are advised to proceed with caution approaching from either direction as Emergency Services remain on scene.


Previous article: N2 closed both directions - Buffels Bay turnoff

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
